verdicts.title: Template snapshot keeps creator's source:'ai' on marked places — friend's first Accept Plan silently DELETES every imported to-do
verdicts.reasoning: Verified the full chain: _clean_marked_places (templates.py:105-108) pops ONLY dayId/timeOfDay and never touches `source`; templates.py has zero references to the marked-place `source` field anywhere on snapshot or _instantiate_template (line 220), so imported places retain source:'ai' (stamped by addOrUpdatePlaceFromVerified, markedPlaces.ts:320); fetchTripMedia (media.ts:204,232) hydrates them verbatim and state.ts loadState (238-247) doesn't touch `source`; onAcceptPlan calls dropAITaggedPlaces(activeTrip) at useAiPlan.ts:459 BEFORE adding new items, and dropAITaggedPlaces (markedPlaces.ts:347) deletes every source==='ai' entry — and commit 3186648 documents this exact deletion mechanism as a real data-loss bug whose fix did NOT cover the template-import path.

verdicts.title: Imported template to-dos are pre-ticked for AI (forAI:true) — friend's very first AI generation silently includes the creator's places in the prompt
verdicts.reasoning: _clean_marked_places preserves forAI/forManual verbatim (templates.py:105-108 pops only dayId/timeOfDay), creator places default to forAI:true && forManual:true (markedPlaces.ts:117,314-315), and runGenerate filters getMarkedPlaces(activeTrip) on exactly `p.forAI && p.forManual` (useAiPlan.ts:297-299) then appends them to the prompt suffix (316), so imported items auto-participate in the friend's first generation with no user action — real but minor/user-correctable, P3 stands.
